docs/security/baseline-audit.md:504:| Shell execution | Denied by default; requires `exec` capability + policy approval | `require('child_process')` — available to any code |
docs/security/baseline-audit.md:505:| File read | Allowed by default; confined to workspace root + extension roots | `require('fs')` — reads any path the process user owns |
docs/security/baseline-audit.md:506:| File write | Allowed by default; atomic writes with temp files | `require('fs')` — writes anywhere |
docs/security/baseline-audit.md:508:| HTTP requests | Allowed by default; mediated through hostcall | `require('http')`, `fetch()` — unrestricted |
